zh.Barnstaple, Devon, England: 英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾
zh.Bishops Tawton, Devon, England: 英國戴文比曉普斯 塔福頓
zh.East Down, Devon, England: 英國戴文易亞斯特 唐
zh.lifeSummary: 當George Pyne於1561年4月19日在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐受洗時，他的父親John Pyne27歲，母親Honor Penfound25歲。他於1583年2月18日與Joan Dart在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1632年8月21日之前在英國，埋葬在英國戴文索福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Pyne于1561年4月19日在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐受洗时，他的父亲John Pyne27岁，母亲Honor Penfound25岁。他于1583年2月18日与Joan Dart在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1632年8月21日之前在英国，埋葬在英国戴文索福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When George Pyne was christened on 19 April 1561, in East Down, Devon, England, his father, John Pyne, was 27 and his mother, Honor Penfound, was 25. He married Joan Dart on 18 February 1583, in Barnstaple, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 21 August 1632, in England, and was buried in Sowton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Pyne a été baptisé le 19 avril 1561, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Pyne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Honor Penfound, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dart le 18 février 1583, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 21 août 1632, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Sowton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Pyne am 19. April 1561 in East Down, Devon, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater John Pyne 27 und seine Mutter Honor Penfound 25. Er hat am 18. Februar 1583 in Barnstaple, Devon, England Joan Dart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 21. August 1632 in England und wurde in Sowton, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Pyne è stato battezzato il 19 aprile 1561 nel East Down, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Pyne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Honor Penfound, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dart il 18 febbraio 1583, nel Barnstaple, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 21 agosto 1632, nel England, e fu sepolto a Sowton, Devon, England.

ja.Sowton, Devon, England: イギリスデボンソウトン

ja.East Down, Devon, England: イギリスデボンエアスト ダウン
ja.lifeSummary: George Pyneが1561年4月19日にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンで洗礼を受けた時，父John Pyneは27歳，母Honor Penfoundは25歳であった。1583年2月18日にイギリスデボンバーンスタプルでJoan Dartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1632年8月21日以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリスデボンソウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Pyne(이)가 1561년 4월 19일 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pyne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Honor Penfound(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1583년 2월 18일 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 Joan Dart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1632년 8월 21일 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 소우턴에 묻혔다.

mn.19 April 1561–before 21 August 1632: 1561 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 19–1632 оны Наймдугаар сарын 21–наас өмнө

pt.19 April 1561–before 21 August 1632: 19 de abril de 1561–antes 21 de agosto de 1632
pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Pyne foi batizado em 19 de abril de 1561, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pyne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Honor Penfound, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dart em 18 de fevereiro de 1583, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 21 de agosto de 1632, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Pyne был крещен 19 апреля 1561 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Pyne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Honor Penfound, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dart 18 февраля 1583 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 21 августа 1632 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности соутон, девон, Англия.

es.19 April 1561–before 21 August 1632: 19 de abril de 1561–antes de 21 de agosto de 1632
es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Pyne se bautizó el 19 de abril de 1561, en East Down, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Pyne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Honor Penfound, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Dart el 18 de febrero de 1583, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 21 de agosto de 1632, en Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra.
